disclaimer: DESIGN-ONLY spec. Not enforced. Does not constitute investment advice. No profit, return, or investment performance claims are made. This spec must not include buy/sell/hold/action fields.
purpose: Capture the output of a paper-only dry-run execution: what rows were evaluated, how many passed or were blocked, and which coverage metadata fields were populated. A dry-run-sample artifact documents a simulation boundary — no real DB writes, no corpus mutations, no scoring activations occurred.

phase.description: Producing phase identifier, e.g. P31, P32

mode.description: Execution mode descriptor. Expected value for MonthlyRevenue path: 'source-present-dry-run'

paperOnly.description: Must be true. Asserts no live orders or real execution occurred.

dryRun.description: Must be true. Asserts no DB writes, corpus mutations, or scoring mutations.

entersAlphaScore.description: Must be false. MonthlyRevenue and all current dry-run sources are excluded from alphaScore.

notInvestmentRecommendation.description: Must be true. Asserts this artifact cannot be used as investment advice.

disclaimer.description: Governance disclaimer asserting this is not investment advice

rowCount.description: Total rows evaluated in the dry-run

blockedRows.description: Rows that did not pass the gate condition

releaseDateCoverage.description: Coverage stats for the releaseDate field: {count: integer, pct: number}

releaseDateSourceCoverage.description: Coverage stats for releaseDateSource: {count: integer, pct: number, policy: string}

releaseDateConfidenceCoverage.description: Coverage stats for releaseDateConfidence: {count: integer, pct: number, confidence: string}

auditConclusion.description: Human-readable one-sentence conclusion for the dry-run

authorizationReceived.description: For authorization-gated dry-runs: whether the required user phrase was received

gate.description: Gate status string if dry-run is waiting for authorization

dbQueryMethod.description: Method used to query the database, e.g. 'sqlite3 prisma/dev.db'

dbQuery.description: SQL query executed for the gate scan

policy.description: Release date inference policy in effect, e.g. INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH

runId.description: Unique run identifier for fixture pinning and cross-artifact tracing

source.description: Source model name if the dry-run targets a single source (e.g. MonthlyRevenue)

executionNote.description: Narrative note about how the dry-run was executed

fieldTypeExpectations.paperOnly: boolean — must be true; hard constraint
fieldTypeExpectations.dryRun: boolean — must be true; hard constraint
fieldTypeExpectations.entersAlphaScore: boolean — must be false; hard constraint
fieldTypeExpectations.notInvestmentRecommendation: boolean — must be true; hard constraint

mappedArtifacts.mapping: requiredFields.mode, requiredFields.paperOnly, requiredFields.dryRun, requiredFields.entersAlphaScore, requiredFields.notInvestmentRecommendation, requiredFields.dryRunStatus, requiredFields.overallClassification, optionalFields.rowCount, optionalFields.blockedRows, optionalFields.releaseDateCoverage, optionalFields.auditConclusion

optionalFields.source, optionalFields.dbQueryMethod, optionalFields.dbQuery, optionalFields.rowCount (totalRows), optionalFields.blockedRows, optionalFields.policy, requiredFields.overallClassification, requiredFields.entersAlphaScore, requiredFields.paperOnly, requiredFields.dryRun
requiredFields.dryRun, requiredFields.dryRunStatus (gate), optionalFields.authorizationReceived, optionalFields.dbQueryMethod, optionalFields.executionNote, requiredFields.entersAlphaScore

optionalFields.runId, requiredFields.mode (simulationMode), requiredFields.paperOnly (scaffoldNotes), requiredFields.dryRun (dryRun enforced), requiredFields.entersAlphaScore, requiredFields.notInvestmentRecommendation

exampleSnippet._note: SYNTHESIZED EXAMPLE — not real data. Does not constitute investment advice.
exampleSnippet.auditConclusion: All 2143 MonthlyRevenue rows pass source-present dry-run gate. No leakage risk detected.
exampleSnippet.disclaimer: SYNTHESIZED EXAMPLE. Does not constitute investment advice. No profit, return, or investment performance claims.
